system.specialQuality: half damage from stabbing or slashing weapons (unless magical)
system.moves:
- Manifest a churning mass out of nearby earth, sand, and rocks
- Pin a smaller foe (+grabby)
- Grind a pinned foe, dealing damage w/advantage (+messy)
- Ruin a sturdy object or structure (costs 1d4 HP)
- Shake the earth (+area, +forceful, one range greater than normal; costs 1d4 HP)

An earth matrix absorbs power from pressure, blunt force, and seismic activity. It gains 1d4 HP from a week buried under earth or stone, from being at the bottom of a rockslide or cave-in, or from touching the ground during a major earthquake (not one it created). When you strike an earth matrix with a bludgeoning attack, it takes no damage. If the blow was forceful and its vortex has 10
